scenarios.description: parse(null) returns null when version is null (r0 == null)
pseudocode: TEST TC01 parse null-input returns null

GIVEN
    String version = null;

scenarios.description: parse("") returns null when trimmed version is empty (invalid input)
pseudocode: TEST TC02 parse empty-string returns null

GIVEN
    String version = "";

scenarios.description: parse("   ") returns null when trimmed version is empty (blank input)
pseudocode: TEST TC03 parse blank-string returns null

GIVEN
    String version = "   ";

scenarios.description: parse("a.b.c") returns null when version format is invalid (non-numeric parts)
pseudocode: TEST TC04 parse invalid-format returns null

GIVEN
    String version = "a.b.c";

scenarios.description: parse("-1.2.3") returns null when negative numeric parts are not allowed
pseudocode: TEST TC05 parse negative-numeric returns null

GIVEN
    String version = "-1.2.3";

scenarios.description: parse("1.2.3") returns Semver with major=1, minor=2, patch=3, no pre-release or build
scenarios.expectedResult: result is non-null Semver with version="1.2.3", major=1, minor=2, patch=3, preRelease=[], build=[]
pseudocode: TEST TC06 parse simple-version returns Semver

GIVEN
    String version = "1.2.3";

scenarios.description: parse(" 1.2.3 ") trims whitespace and returns Semver(1.2.3)
scenarios.expectedResult: result is non-null Semver with version="1.2.3"
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parse trimmed-version returns Semver

GIVEN
    String version = " 1.2.3 ";

scenarios.expectedResult: result is non-null Semver with version="1.2.3-alpha.1", preRelease=["alpha","1"], build=[]
pseudocode: TEST TC08 parse pre-release returns Semver

GIVEN
    String version = "1.2.3-alpha.1";

scenarios.expectedResult: result is non-null Semver with version="1.2.3+build.123", preRelease=[], build=["build","123"]
pseudocode: TEST TC09 parse build returns Semver

GIVEN
    String version = "1.2.3+build.123";

scenarios.description: parse("1.2.3-beta+exp.sha.5114f85") returns Semver with both pre-release and build metadata
scenarios.expectedResult: result is non-null Semver with version="1.2.3-beta+exp.sha.5114f85", preRelease=["beta"], build=["exp","sha","5114f85"]
pseudocode: TEST TC10 parse combined-pre-and-build returns Semver

GIVEN
    String version = "1.2.3-beta+exp.sha.5114f85";
